use_cases: Creating animated hero sections with vibrant radial gradients
Adding ambient breathing animations to landing page backgrounds
Enhancing brand presentations with customizable color gradients
Building immersive full-screen visual experiences for web apps
Providing decorative background layers for marketing websites
ai_summary: Animated radial gradient background component with configurable colors and an optional breathing animation effect. Uses framer-motion for smooth entrance animations and supports customizable gradient stops, animation speed, and container styling. Designed as a decorative visual layer for hero sections, landing pages, or full-screen backgrounds.
